title: ratonia rufescens
intro: Ratonia rufescens is a plant species within the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the ratonia or ratonia rufescens, native to Australia and New Zealand. This plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Ratonia rufescens include its ability to soothe coughs, reduce fever, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. Ratonia rufescens can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and essential oils, allowing for various forms of application and treatment.
